violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the (basement), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the (bottom of chip shelf) have an accumulation of rodent droppings. Staff cleaned, and sanitized chip shelf at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

Empty cans were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed empty cans from sink during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/16/2026

The door to the outside, located in the (front), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

The presence of (pest) is not controlled as evidenced by (gnawed chips). PIC voluntarily disposed bag of kettle chips. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/16/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (QT) sanitizing solution for the (3-bay sink). New Violation. Correct By: 03/16/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the (hand sink) has debris. PIC shall clean and sanitize hand sink before use. New Violation. Correct By: 03/16/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the fan covers have an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 12/14/2023
